description: Ion regalloc with --ion-regalloc=simple did not insert a keep-alive use of the result of `import()` when followed by a recursive `apply` with `^0` coercion: NeedsKeepAlive only inspected the def-instruction and missed the use-instruction. Ion then dead-eliminated the import Promise's nursery cell before its forwarding pointer was updated → crash in js::Nursery::forwardBufferPointer when the next GC scan walked the stale buffer. sec-high. Fix: also check use-instruction in NeedsKeepAlive (git 5dcdd12edecd r=iain, Phabricator D265302).
